title: ucriana wallichii
side_effects: Ucriana wallichii can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as headaches and dizziness. Prolonged use may also cause liver and kidney damage due to the presence of toxic compounds. Additionally, Ucriana wallichii can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and reduce their efficacy or increase the risk of bleeding. It's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Ucriana wallichii for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
